display.purpose: Live timer readout inside TimerDisplay only (36sp ExtraBold).

headline.purpose: Screen-level titles; never inside a card.

title.purpose: TopAppBar titles and primary list-item text.

body.purpose: Main body copy and supporting information.

label.purpose: Buttons, chips, and UPPERCASE day-group section headers.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Cards at rest. Invisible in dark mode; swapped for a 1px #CAC4D0 border.

shadows.name: active-selection
shadows.purpose: Selected SideSelector tiles and home cards with a running session. The 1dp to 6dp jump is the active-state signal.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: State-driven color and elevation transitions (220-240ms). The system's motion signature.

motion.name: timer-pulse
motion.purpose: TimerDisplay ring pulse while a session runs.

motion.name: cue-tap
motion.purpose: CueChip tap confirmation; the one place spring-like keyframing is allowed.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped primary action; the main commit affordance on tracking screens and bottom sheets.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C2185B; color: #fff; font: 600 14px/20px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.1px; min-height: 48px; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A31350; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #880E4F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action; 2px border in the active domain accent over a transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #1976D2; font: 600 14px/20px system-ui, sans-serif; min-height: 48px; padding: 14px 24px; border: 2px solid #1976D2; border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(25,118,210,0.08); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0D47A1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: SideSelector Tile
components.description: The left/right breast chooser. Selected tile fills with the feeding accent and lifts to 6dp; the elevation jump is the state signal.
components.css: .ds-side-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; } .ds-side { flex: 1; height: 88px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; background: #FFFDE7; color: rgba(26,26,26,0.4); border: 2px solid #F8BBD0; border-radius: 16px; font: 600 14px/20px system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.24s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), background 0.24s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-side--selected { background: #C2185B; color: #fff; border-color: #C2185B; box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(26,26,26,0.22); } .ds-side:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #880E4F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Home Summary Card (active)
components.description: Domain tile on the home grid with a running session. Fills with the full role color and lifts to 6dp; a Live badge sits top-right.
components.html:
Live
🍼
Breastfeeding
12:04
components.css: .ds-home-card { position: relative; min-height: 120px; padding: 20px; border-radius: 24px; background: #F8BBD0; color: #880E4F; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(26,26,26,0.16); transition: background 0.24s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 0.24s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-home-card--active { background: #C2185B; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(26,26,26,0.22); } .ds-home-emoji { font-size: 28px; line-height: 1; } .ds-home-name { font: 600 18px/24px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.15px; margin-top: 12px; } .ds-home-ctx { font: 600 18px/24px system-ui, sans-serif; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-home-badge { position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 50px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); font: 500 11px/16px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; animation: ds-pulse 900ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1) infinite alternate; } @keyframes ds-pulse { from { transform: scale(0.82); } to { transform: scale(1.18); } }

components.name: Diaper Home Card (idle)
components.description: Extended-domain home tile. Diaper Yellow container with dark on-accent text; stateless, so it stays at idle elevation.
components.html:
🧷
Diaper
3 wet · 1 dirty today
components.css: .ds-diaper-card { min-height: 120px; padding: 20px; border-radius: 24px; background: #FFE9A8; color: #5F4B00; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(26,26,26,0.16); } .ds-diaper-name { font: 600 18px/24px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.15px; margin-top: 12px; } .ds-diaper-ctx { font: 400 14px/20px system-ui, sans-serif; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: SleepPredictionCard
components.description: Flat sleep-domain card surfacing the next-sleep window, with an UPPERCASE section label and trailing confidence dots.
components.html:
🛏 Sleep prediction
2:30 PM
between 2:10 and 2:55
components.css: .ds-pred { padding: 16px; border-radius: 24px; background: #B3E5FC; color: #0D47A1; } .ds-pred-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-pred-label { font: 700 12px/16px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.8px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-pred-dots { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-pred-dots i { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1976D2; display: inline-block; } .ds-pred-dots .ds-pred-dots--off { background: rgba(25,118,210,0.22); } .ds-pred-time { font: 700 32px/40px system-ui, sans-serif; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-pred-range { font: 400 14px/20px system-ui, sans-serif; opacity: 0.55; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Allergy Chip
components.description: Non-interactive display tag in the Settings baby profile.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: #F8BBD0; color: #880E4F; font: 500 11px/16px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }

components.name: Tip Card
components.description: Informational inline card: surface fill with a 1px outline border instead of a domain container, so it reads as non-interactive.
components.css: .ds-tip { padding: 16px; border-radius: 24px; background: #FFFDE7; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #CAC4D0; font: 400 16px/24px system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }

narrative.overview: Akachan is a warm record both parents keep across the day, not a dashboard that scores them on it. The visual system is warm and legible first; it carries personality through restraint, not decoration. The cream surface is the page. Each care domain is a colored tab in the same familiar book: Pink feeding, Blue sleep, Yellow diaper, Teal growth, Purple milestones, Green pumping. Households turn tabs on and off through feature selection, and every word reads equally well in English and Brazilian Portuguese. The system rejects clinical white-and-teal intake-form apps, loud cartoon baby brands, and fitness-tracker performance dashboards. Akachan does not count reps. It records moments.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream (#FFFDE7) as the single app surface, never pure white
Semantic color tabs by domain: Pink feeding, Blue sleep, Yellow diaper, Teal growth, Purple milestones, Green pumping/threshold
Only feeding/sleep/pumping have M3 colorScheme slots; other domains are extended palettes via *Colors() helpers
Generous touch targets: 88dp selector tiles, 48dp buttons
System font across all weights; hierarchy through weight contrast
Elevation signals state, not hierarchy; flat at rest
Dark mode is a first-class citizen tuned for 3am legibility
Feature-selectable home grid; active sessions animate color and elevation
Fully bilingual (en + pt-BR); layouts absorb length variance

rules.name: The Semantic Tab Rule
rules.body: Each domain owns exactly one hue family: Pink feeding, Blue sleep, Green pumping/over-limit, Yellow diaper, Teal growth, Purple milestones. They never appear as decorative interchangeables. When a screen surfaces more than one domain, the active domain's hue dominates.

rules.name: The No Pure White Rule
rules.body: The app surface is always Warm Cream (#FFFDE7). Pure white appears only as text on filled Pink, Blue, Teal, or Purple accents; never on Diaper Yellow, and never as a background.

rules.name: The Extended-Palette Rule
rules.body: Diaper, Growth, Milestone, Warning, and Bottle tokens live outside M3 and must be reached through their *Colors() helper or imported by name from Color.kt. Never route them through MaterialTheme.colorScheme.

rules.name: The ExtraBold Timer Rule
rules.body: displaySmall (36sp ExtraBold) is used exclusively for the live elapsed-time readout in TimerDisplay. Reusing it elsewhere collapses the hierarchy.

rules.name: The UPPERCASE Header Rule
rules.body: Day-group history headers and the SleepPredictionCard section label use labelMedium uppercase. This is the only context where uppercase text appears.

rules.name: The Translation Slack Rule
rules.body: All user-facing text comes from string resources (en + pt-BR); pt-BR often runs longer. Never size a label or container to a single language. Let text wrap or the container grow; never truncate a primary label.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only in response to user-initiated state change.

rules.name: The Dark Mode Swap Rule
rules.body: Ambient 1dp shadows are invisible on dark surfaces; swap them for a 1dp outlineVariant (#CAC4D0) border via LocalDarkTheme.current rather than deepening the shadow.

rules.name: The Two-Step Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: Exactly two active elevation steps: 1dp ambient and 6dp selected. A third step breaks the grammar.

dos: Do use Warm Cream (#FFFDE7) for all app backgrounds; pure white removes the warmth that distinguishes Akachan from a clinical interface.
Do assign color by domain tab: Pink feeding, Blue sleep, Green pumping/over-limit, Yellow diaper, Teal growth, Purple milestones.
Do reach extended-domain colors through their *Colors() helper or by name from Color.kt; only feeding/sleep/pumping live in MaterialTheme.colorScheme.
Do pair Diaper Yellow with dark on-accent text (#3E2E00) in both schemes; white never reaches 4.5:1 on a vivid yellow.
Do use the pill shape (50dp) for primary buttons, large radius (24dp) for home cards, medium (16dp) for history cards and selector tiles.
Do give primary interactive elements a minimum 48dp tap height; SideSelector tiles 88dp.
Do replace ambient shadows with a 1dp #CAC4D0 border in dark mode via LocalDarkTheme.current.
Do source every user-facing string from resources (en + pt-BR) and let containers grow for the longer language using animateContentSize.
Do use LabelMedium uppercase only for day-group history headers and in-card section labels.
Do communicate an active session at the screen level via a banner, ActiveStatusBadge, or TimerDisplay.
Do treat dark mode as first-class; every new component and domain palette needs explicit dark assignments.
Do prefer a bottom sheet over a dialog for editing; reuse onboarding step composables in Settings sheets.
Do use tween(200-240ms, EaseOutQuart) for state-driven color and elevation transitions.
donts: Don't build clinical white or sterile layouts; Akachan is a family tool, not a hospital intake form.
Don't use oversaturated cartoon palettes, bubble fonts, or primary-color noise.
Don't treat tracking as a performance metric: no stat rings, goal dashboards, or SaaS hero metrics. Growth charts plot WHO reference curves, not scores.
Don't route extended-domain or warning tokens through MaterialTheme.colorScheme; it does not carry them.
Don't reuse one domain's hue for another or mix two accents on the same surface as a stylistic choice.
Don't hardcode user-facing strings or size a control to fit only English; truncation in pt-BR is a bug.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text effects; all text is a single solid color.
Don't use side-stripe borders wider than 1dp as a colored accent on cards or list items.
Don't reach for a modal dialog as the first editing solution; Settings and logging use bottom sheets.
Don't introduce shadows deeper than 6dp or multi-layer shadow compositions.
Don't use FontFamily.Default at displaySmall (36sp ExtraBold) for anything other than the live timer readout.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing; spring keyframing is reserved for tap microinteractions.
